name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_brazier_deploy_text_audit_mcw
description: Focused normal player-action brazier deployment primitive audit. Uses saved-player exact inventory preflight, harness-gated UI selector/direction traces, secondary GUI-as-text/OCR captures, then requires saved east-tile f_brazier before any fuel/lighter/fire proof can continue.

steps.label: exact_items_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The exact-items McWilliams fixture is loaded on the map before the focused deploy primitive audit.

steps.label: audit_saved_inventory_has_brazier_before_apply
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player inventory contains the exact brazier item before the Apply inventory is opened
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit any Apply/deploy UI step if the exact brazier item is missing from saved-player inventory
steps.abort_reason: exact brazier fixture item missing before player-action deploy primitive audit

steps.label: open_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Apply key is sent; the following harness UI trace gate must prove the Use item inventory opened before another unsafe key fires.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_apply_inventory_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the Use item inventory opened
steps.next_step_gate: do not type inventory filter keys unless the Use item inventory-open trace is present
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove the Use item inventory opened before filtering

steps.label: filter_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filter key is sent only after the Use item inventory-open trace is green; OCR is secondary discovery evidence only.

steps.label: type_brazier_filter_for_apply_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The brazier filter text is submitted only after the Apply inventory-open trace is green.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_filtered_brazier_selected
required_patterns: openclaw_harness_ui_trace: component=inventory_selector event=state title="Use item" filter="brazier" action="redraw" selection_method="highlight_after_redraw"
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace after redraw proves the Apply inventory filter is brazier and the highlighted row is the brazier item
steps.preconditions: the Use item inventory is open and the brazier filter text was typed.
steps.next_step_gate: do not press confirm unless the highlighted filtered row is proven as brazier
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove filtered highlighted item was brazier before confirm

steps.label: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filtered inventory row is confirmed; following harness UI trace gates must prove the returned item is brazier and Deploy where? opened.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_brazier_selected_and_deploy_prompt_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the selector returned brazier and opened Deploy where?
steps.preconditions: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt confirmed the filtered Apply inventory row.
steps.next_step_gate: do not send right/east unless the returned item is brazier and the Deploy where? prompt is open
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove selected brazier plus Deploy where? before right/east

steps.label: place_prompted_brazier_east
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Deploy where? prompt accepts right/east and returns to the map.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_deploy_prompt_consumed_right
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? direction prompt
steps.next_step_gate: do not save/audit east tile unless right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? prompt
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove right/east was consumed by Deploy where?

steps.label: save_after_text_guarded_brazier_deploy
steps.expected_visible_fact: The game returns to the map after saving the text-guarded brazier deploy checkpoint.

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains f_brazier furniture metadata after the text-guarded Apply/deploy step
steps.preconditions: save_after_text_guarded_brazier_deploy wrote a same-run save immediately after normal item activation placement.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit fuel/lighter/fire proof unless this deploy metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: text-guarded normal player-action brazier deploy metadata missing before fuel/lighter/fire steps
